Bash(cd "Q:/Claudework/bridge base" && python -c "
import sqlite3
conn = sqlite3.connect\('master.db'\)

print\('=== jobs 테이블 ==='\)
print\('총 건수:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM jobs'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('고유 코드:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT job_code\) FROM jobs'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('중복\(seq>1\):', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM jobs WHERE seq > 1'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('파트타임:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM jobs WHERE is_part_time=1'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 급여 있는 건 ==='\)
print\('salary_min 있음:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM jobs WHERE salary_min IS NOT NULL'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 상위 5건 샘플 ==='\)
rows = conn.execute\('SELECT job_code, seq, city, start_date, salary_min, salary_max FROM jobs LIMIT 5'\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    print\(r\)

print\(\)
print\('=== client_inquiries 테이블 ==='\)
print\('총 건수:', conn.execute\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM client_inquiries'\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('구CSV:', conn.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM client_inquiries WHERE source_file='BRIDGE_clients_data.csv'\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)
print\('신CSV:', conn.execute\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM client_inquiries WHERE source_file='BRIDGE_clients_data_New.csv'\\"\).fetchone\(\)[0]\)

print\(\)
print\('=== 신CSV 학교명 ==='\)
rows = conn.execute\(\\"SELECT school_name, location, salary_raw FROM client_inquiries WHERE source_file='BRIDGE_clients_data_New.csv'\\"\).fetchall\(\)
for r in rows:
    print\(r\)

conn.close\(\)
" 2>&1)

# sys.stdout wrapper 없이 직접 테스트
import sys
# stdout 래퍼가 문제인지 확인
import io
sys.stdout = io.TextIOWrapper\(sys.stdout.buffer, encoding='utf-8', errors='replace'\)
from fastapi import FastAPI
print\('OK after wrapper'\)
